case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. ANTHONY D PARDILLA et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT PARDILLA, ANTHONY D DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2010
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $267.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $500.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PARDILLA, ANTHONY D

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARDILLA, ANTHONY D $7,788.02 PRINCIPAL, $9,326.93 INTEREST, $267.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,382.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-29-2010 CONTINUED TO MAR-30-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-29-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
